title: Yasna 46: Zoroaster's Isolation
description: Zoroaster's lament of isolation: rejected by his clan, he asks Ahura Mazda where to turn for help.
introduction: Zoroaster's lament of isolation: rejected by his clan, he asks Ahura Mazda where to turn for help.

translation.text: To what land shall I go? To what land shall I turn? I am excluded from family and tribe.
